top_signals.title: Putin heads to Beijing days after Trump in test of China's balancing act
top_signals.summary: Beijing walks into the summit with the stronger hand while Moscow seeks reassurance that China has not drifted toward Washington after Trump's visit.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Musk loses case against OpenAI after two hours of jury deliberations
top_signals.summary: Decision hands a legal victory to Sam Altman in a case that had overshadowed the AI lab’s plans to go public
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Japan ready to act on foreign exchange volatility
top_signals.summary: Rising U.S. Treasury yields have fueled market speculation that Washington may become sensitive to large-scale yen-buying, dollar-selling intervention by Japan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Zerohash secures first EMI license under MiCA for stablecoin and brokerage services in Europe
top_signals.summary: Zerohash Europe is the first firm licensed under Europe’s flagship MiCA crypto regulation to also hold full EMI status.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: In Lee's hometown, Japan and South Korea seek to deepen thaw
